title: Runbook Step Executor Simulator
description:
Input: `STEP_N: action` lines, then `---`, then a comma-separated list of completed step numbers.

Return the full text of the first incomplete step. Return `none` if all steps are complete.
constraints: Input is a plain string passed to solve(input string) string
Return a string matching the expected output exactly
Return empty string where the problem specifies no results

examples.input:
STEP_1: Check pod status
STEP_2: Restart deployment
STEP_3: Notify stakeholders
---
1,2
examples.explanation: See test case: 2 of 3 steps complete

test_cases.input:
STEP_1: Check pod status
STEP_2: Restart deployment
STEP_3: Notify stakeholders
---
1,2

STEP_1: Reboot server
STEP_2: Verify health
---
1,2

STEP_1: First action
STEP_2: Second action
---
